item.title: From rocky slopes to regenerative fiber: How HimGra® is building climate resilience in the Himalayas - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: Community-led innovation restores degraded land while strengthening rural livelihoods

item.title: 12 initiatives advancing climate resilience across the Hindu Kush Himalaya region - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: Accelerating climate resilience through locally rooted innovation

item.title: Finance in Flux: a new reading of the resilience and adaptation finance landscape - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: A new joint paper from the Global Resilience Partnership and RAKSHA Intelligence Futures, published as the Global Partnerships Conference opens in London, argues that the binding constraint on resilience and adaptation finance now sits in the gap between knowing and acting.

item.title: Call for proposals for innovations across the Global South now open - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: We are launching an Innovation Challenge call to support bold, locally led solutions that strengthen resilience, protect ecosystems, and create sustainable opportunities for communities.

item.title: Protecting shea trees: Securing women’s livelihoods - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: Learn how protecting shea trees sustains livelihoods, strengthens rights, and empowers women

item.title: Advancing women’s rights to strengthen shea enterprises - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: In northern Ghana, digital mapping and access to finance are helping women shea producers like Adisah Zakaria turn invisible work into recognised assets, unlocking income, efficiency, and opportunity.

item.title: Bridging the gap: Scaling climate-resilient agriculture - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: Bridge funding helps transform RAIN innovations into scalable solutions that drive resilience and sustainable growth

item.title: Protecting the shea tree: Securing women’s futures - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: Empowering women through shea tree mapping for resilient futures

item.title: From Seeds to systems: Inspiring collective change - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: Interview with GRP’s Knowledge Officer Amanda Jonsson on how local initiatives are shaping pathways to more sustainable futures

item.title: Two job opportunities: Human Resources (HR) Manager and Operations and Grants Manager - Global Resilience Partnership
item.description: Apply by 3 April to join the GRP team

item.title: No Plugins, No Problem: Integrating TAK, Meshtastic, and iOS | Meshtastic
item.description: Announcing native TAK Server integration in the Meshtastic iOS app, bridging mesh networking with situational awareness tools.

item.title: Zero-Cost Hops for Favorite Routers | Meshtastic
item.description: Stretch your mesh by stretching each hop by using zero-cost hops

item.title: Demystifying ROUTER_LATE | Meshtastic
item.description: What is the purpose of the ROUTER_LATE role, and when should it be used?

item.title: ...That one time at DEF CON! | Meshtastic
item.description: A recap of the Meshtastic DEF CON deployment, including a vulnerability demonstration and the project's response.

item.title: Updates to Supported Hardware | Meshtastic
item.description: A new approach to streamline supported devices, reduce maintenance overhead, and improve long-term sustainability for the Meshtastic project.

item.title: Meshtastic 2.7 Preview: UI Overhaul - Introducing BaseUI! + New Input Support + TFT Unification | Meshtastic
item.description: Meshtastic 2.7 is here with a complete redesign of the standard UI, Introducing BaseUI! New input support on native linux, and the ability to switch between UIs on supported hardware.

item.title: A Major Solution to a Miner Problem | Meshtastic
item.description: Breathe new life into abandoned LoRa crypto mining hardware by converting it into a powerful Meshtastic nodes

item.title: Is LongFast Holding Your Mesh Back? Better LoRa Presets for Bigger Meshtastic Networks | Meshtastic
item.description: Improve your local mesh network by moving away from the default LongFast preset to higher bandwidth options

item.title: Meshtastic 2.6 Preview: MUI and Next-Hop Routing are here! | Meshtastic
item.description: Meshtastic version 2.6 preview is here! This has been 1.5 years in the making and includes the first release of our brand new UI for standalone devices, MUI, as well as an all new routing algorithm for Direct Messages. Plus more!

item.title: Meshtastic Designer – A New Customization Tool for RAKwireless Hardware | Meshtastic
item.description: Meshtastic Designer is here! A new tool to easily configure and visualize your Meshtastic setup using RAKwireless WisBlock hardware.
